_readme: Example Make.com scenario configuration. This is documentation JSON showing how to wire SoterAI modules into a typical AI workflow. It is NOT an executable Make blueprint -- use it as a reference when building your own scenarios.
name: Webhook -> SoterAI Input Guard -> OpenAI -> SoterAI Output Guard
description: Receives a user message via webhook, scans it with SoterAI Input Guard, sends safe messages to OpenAI for completion, then scans the AI response with SoterAI Output Guard before returning the result.

modules.label: Receive User Message
modules.notes: Configure a custom webhook in Make. The incoming payload should include a 'message' field.

modules.label: SoterAI: Check Input for Threats
modules.notes: If allowed=false, use a Make filter/router to block the request.

modules.label: OpenAI: Chat Completion
modules.notes: Use the safeText from step 2 (may have PII redacted) as the prompt.
